mapper.sql: SELECT u.id, u.login, u.password, u.name, u.birth_date, u.age, u.salary, r.name AS role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE login = #{login})
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.name = 'ADMIN'
SELECT name FROM roles ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login, password, name, birth_date, age, salary) VALUES (#{login}, #{password}, #{name}, #{birthday}, #{age, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{salary, jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, birth_date = #{birthday}, age = #{age, jdbcType=INTEGER}, salary = #{salary, jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE login = #{login}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE login = #{login})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) VALUES (#{userId}, (SELECT id FROM roles WHERE name = #{roleName}))
